title: elaphoglossum archboldii
intro: Elaphoglossum archboldii is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum archboldii include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and promoting relaxation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
